case_polarization_19062026_005completed

2026-06-19 15:36:10 UTC · 16m 43s · simulation 58.5s · imaging 14m 56s
SKA-LOW Polarization Science Case
350 bright point sources spread across the full 0.07 deg (~4.2 arcmin) imaging FOV so they reach the edges of the field. Stokes I is log-uniform from 100 µJy to 2 mJy. All sources have Q=U=V=0 except one with Stokes V set to 1 mJy, producing a clear circular-polarization detection.

Observation & Telescope

TelescopeSKA-LOW-AAstar (SKA_OST_ARRAY_CONFIG_2_3_1)
Dish Diameter38.0 m
Antennas307
Beam FoV (FWHM)1.88° (diffraction limit: 1.25 λ/D)
Frequency Range200-400 MHz
Central Frequency300 MHz
Channels16 x 12.5 MHz
Total Bandwidth200 MHz
Obs Time1200 s
Timesteps150
Integration8 s
Telescope Layout
UV Coverage

Inputs FITS catalog configs/portfolio/science-case-polarization/pol_source_catalog.json

  "uv_coverage": true,
  "shadems_command": "conda run -n shadems shadems",
  "uv_coverage_canvas_size": 600,
  "output_dir": "../skasim-executions/case_polarization_19062026_005",
  "overwrite": true,
  "title": "SKA-LOW Polarization Science Case",
  "description": "350 bright point sources spread across the full 0.07 deg (~4.2 arcmin) imaging FOV so they reach the edges of the field.  Stokes I is log-uniform from 100 µJy to 2 mJy.  All sources have Q=U=V=0 except one with Stokes V set to 1 mJy, producing a clear circular-polarization detection."
}
